title: unshare: do not set USER=root
body:
do not override the USER environment variable to "root" as it confuses
the runc rootless mode.  runc is using the USER variable to determine
whether XDG_RUNTIME_DIR must be honored or not.

Closes: https://github.com/containers/buildah/issues/1271

Signed-off-by: Giuseppe Scrivano <gscrivan@redhat.com>

comments.body:
:pushpin: Commit 619d300 has been approved by `rhatdan`

<!-- @rh-atomic-bot r=rhatdan 619d3000fee640e948bd80d200b1a7406a07008e -->

I can confirm it fixes the issue:
```
$ ./buildah from python:3-alpine
Getting image source signatures
Copying blob cd784148e348: 2.10 MiB / 2.10 MiB [===========================] 14s
Copying blob a5ca736b15eb: 301.88 KiB / 301.88 KiB [=======================] 14s
Copying blob f320f547ff02: 23.46 MiB / 23.46 MiB [=========================] 14s
Copying blob 2edd8ff8cb8f: 233 B / 233 B [=================================] 14s
Copying blob 9381128744b2: 1.70 MiB / 1.70 MiB [===========================] 14s
Copying config 1a8edcb29ce4: 5.98 KiB / 5.98 KiB [==========================] 0s
Writing manifest to image destination
Storing signatures
python-working-container

$ ./buildah unshare

# ./buildah mount python-working-container
/home/tt/.local/share/containers/storage/overlay/d728ff48289c54dc63957d7c8e3e917e92b10eae52e5b3aec0fdd49a2797d75a/merged

# ls /home/tt/.local/share/containers/storage/overlay/d728ff48289c54dc63957d7c8e3e917e92b10eae52e5b3aec0fdd49a2797d75a/merged
bin  dev  etc  home  lib  media  mnt  proc  root  run  sbin  srv  sys  tmp  usr  var

$ ./buildah run python-working-container ls
bin    dev    etc    home   lib    media  mnt    proc   root   run    sbin   srv    sys    tmp    usr    var
```

:sunny: Test successful - [status-papr](https://s3.amazonaws.com/aos-ci/ghprb/projectatomic/buildah/fe7e09c08e29f027eba1f3e20df2e325382561f8.1547465814606439424/index.html), [status-travis](https://travis-ci.org/containers/buildah/builds/479352469?utm_source=github_status&utm_medium=notification)
